summary.write_policy: Only decisions with writeback_action=add_up may be applied, and only through dry-run/apply small batches.

non_taxonomy_boundary_policy.rationale: BM25 is a sparse retrieval scoring function/representative route signal, not a multi-route retrieval subtype.
Dense Retrieval can be one route inside Multi-Route Retrieval, but a route/component is not a child taxonomy of the orchestration strategy.
Hybrid Search composes a dense retrieval side; it is not a Dense Retrieval subtype.
Hybrid Search composes a sparse retrieval side; it is not a Sparse Retrieval subtype.
Multi-Route Retrieval may include a BM25 sparse route; the strategy is not a BM25 subtype.
Hybrid Search is a common dense+sparse shape inside the wider multi-route retrieval design space; this should be explained as relation, not forced into up.
Multi-Route Retrieval may compose Sparse Retrieval as one route; the strategy is not a child of the route.
Reranking is a downstream ordering stage over candidates; it is not a recall route or subtype of Multi-Route Retrieval.
Sparse Retrieval can be one route inside Multi-Route Retrieval, but a route/component is not a child taxonomy of the orchestration strategy.

non_taxonomy_boundary_policy.safe_relation: foundational_for -> Sparse Retrieval; Sparse Retrieval composed_into -> Multi-Route Retrieval
non_taxonomy_boundary_policy.rationale: TF-IDF itself is not a multi-route retrieval route or strategy; a sparse retrieval route may use TF-IDF/BM25-style signals inside multi-route retrieval.
TF-IDF is a sparse lexical weighting/representation used in retrieval contexts; it is not a RAG subtype.
TF-IDF can supply sparse lexical scoring intuition, but it is not a retriever component subtype.
TF-IDF is a foundational sparse lexical weighting method; Sparse Retrieval is the broader retrieval family.
Top-K is a candidate selection/ranking cutoff, not a multi-route retrieval subtype.

decisions.source_one_line: OpenTelemetry GenAI 是 OpenTelemetry 为生成式 AI 调用、token、模型、工具和 Agent 事件定义的观测语义约定方向。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: OpenTelemetry GenAI is a semantic-convention/standardization layer that supports observability; it is not itself an observability capability subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this candidate to up; preserve as adjacency or explain with typed relation only if needed.

decisions.source_one_line: RAGGraph 是一个不稳定说法，通常可能指“把 RAG pipeline 编排成图工作流”，也可能指“用图结构组织知识并做检索”。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: RAGGraph is an unstable ambiguity/reminder card for workflow graph vs GraphRAG confusion; it remains related to RAG but is not a stable RAG subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this candidate to up; preserve as adjacency or explain with typed relation only if needed.

decisions.source_one_line: State Graph Runtime 是把 Agent / workflow 的执行过程显式建模为“状态 + 节点 + 边 + 路由 + checkpoint”的运行时，让长任务可以循环、分支、暂停、恢复和审计。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: State Graph Runtime executes and persists workflows; runtime infrastructure is adjacent to Agent Workflow, not a workflow subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this candidate to up; preserve as adjacency or explain with typed relation only if needed.

decisions.source_one_line: Top-K 是“按分数排序后取前 K 个”的选择规则；在 RAG 检索里，它通常表示取前 K 个候选 chunk / passages，而在生成解码里，top-k 表示只从概率最高的 K 个 token 中采样。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Top-K is a ranking/selection rule used by retrievers and decoders; it is not itself a retriever subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this candidate to up; preserve as adjacency or explain with typed relation only if needed.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent Control Plane 是管理 Agent 平台运行的控制层：它负责会话、部署、权限、RBAC、观测、审计、调度、human approval 和运行接口，而不是单个 Agent 的推理逻辑本身。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent Framework 是帮助开发者构建、编排、运行和观测 Agent 的软件框架：它把工具、状态、流程、交接、护栏、追踪和恢复做成可复用工程抽象。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent Harness 是包住模型、工具、状态、权限、运行环境、trace 和评测逻辑的执行外壳。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent Lifecycle Hook 是 Agent runtime 在会话、用户输入、工具调用前后、上下文压缩、停止等生命周期边界触发的外部 handler，用来拦截、记录、补充反馈或恢复 agent loop。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent Loop 是 Agent 的行动反馈循环：系统围绕目标反复观察状态、决定下一步、执行动作、接收 [[Observation]]，再把结果写回上下文、[[Agent State]] 或 [[Trace]]，直到任务完成、失败或需要人类接管。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent Robustness 是 Agent 在工具失败、观察噪声、用户行为变化、检索污染、计划偏离或攻击性输入下，仍能保持可接受任务推进、恢复策略和安全边界的系统级稳健性。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent State 是一次 Agent 运行中被系统保存和更新的工作状态：目标、阶段、已知信息、中间结果、工具反馈、错误、审批状态和下一步依据；有些框架把它作为一等对象显式暴露，有些框架只把它藏在消息历史、session、trace 或外部应用代码里。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Agent State 是一次 Agent 运行中被系统保存和更新的工作状态：目标、阶段、已知信息、中间结果、工具反馈、错误、审批状态和下一步依据；有些框架把它作为一等对象显式暴露，有些框架只把它藏在消息历史、session、trace 或外部应用代码里。

decisions.source_one_line: Agent Workflow Static Verification 是在 Agent workflow 部署或运行前，对显式 workflow graph 的节点、边、可达性、终止性、人类审批路径和时序安全策略做静态检查，提前发现 runtime guardrails 只有在路径被触发后才可能看到的结构缺陷。

decisions.source_one_line: Benchmark 是用一组固定任务、运行协议和评分方式来比较系统能力的评测集合。

decisions.source_one_line: Chunking 是把长文档切成适合检索、引用和放入模型上下文的小片段。

decisions.source_one_line: Context Engineering 是设计进入模型上下文的信息结构、顺序、预算、来源和更新方式。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading

decisions.source_one_line: Context Projection 是把 [[Agent State]]、[[Memory]]、[[Trace]]、结构化 notes、工具结果和文件引用等系统持有的信息，选择、压缩、排序成模型本轮可见上下文的机制。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading

decisions.source_one_line: DeerFlow 是 ByteDance 开源的 super agent harness：它在 LangGraph / LangChain 之上，把 lead agent、sub-agents、skills、sandbox、filesystem、memory、context compression 和 messaging gateway 组合成长任务 Agent 运行底座。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Document Ingestion 是把 PDF、网页、表格、代码、图片说明等原始资料转换成可检索、可引用、可更新知识单元的流程。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading

decisions.source_one_line: Durable Execution 是让长任务可以暂停、恢复、重试、记录状态并在失败后继续执行的运行能力。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Durable Execution is a runtime capability used by workflows, not a workflow subtype.

decisions.source_one_line: Embedding 是把文本、图片或其他对象转换成向量表示，让系统可以用距离或相似度计算“语义接近”。

decisions.source_one_line: Eval Harness 是自动运行任务、记录过程、收集输出、打分并复现失败的评测外壳。

decisions.source_one_line: Frontend-first AI Toolkit 是面向 Web / TypeScript / UI streaming 的 AI 应用工具箱，优先解决模型调用、工具循环、流式 UI、provider 适配和前端状态体验，而不一定提供完整多 Agent runtime。

decisions.source_one_line: Guardrails 是限制、检查或修正模型输入、输出和工具动作的安全/质量边界。

decisions.source_one_line: Hallucination 是模型生成了看似合理但缺乏事实依据、证据支持或任务约束的内容；它不是“模型故意撒谎”，而是生成机制和上下文约束不足的可靠性问题。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Handoff 是一个 Agent、workflow 节点或人类角色把任务、上下文和控制权交给另一个执行者的机制。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Handoff is a transfer mechanism inside workflows, not a workflow subtype.

decisions.source_one_line: Hermes Agent 是 Nous Research 的开源 self-improving AI agent runtime，把模型调用、工具执行、记忆、skills、消息平台、MCP、调度、delegation、安全审批和长期目标循环组织成一个具体的 [[Agent Harness]]。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Human-in-the-loop 是在 Agent 工作流中让人类参与确认、修正、接管或提供判断的机制。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Human-in-the-loop is an intervention/approval pattern inside workflows, not a workflow subtype.

decisions.source_one_line: HyDE（Hypothetical Document Embeddings）是先让 LLM 根据 query 生成一段“假设文档 / 假设答案”，再嵌入这段文本去检索真实文档的 query-side retrieval 策略。

decisions.source_one_line: Indirect Prompt Injection 是模型读取网页、文档、邮件、检索片段或工具结果时，被其中隐藏的恶意指令影响。

decisions.source_one_line: Knowledge Graph 是把实体和实体之间的关系显式组织成图结构的知识表示方式；在 RAG 里，它常用于让检索利用关系、多跳路径和结构化查询，而不只依赖文本相似度。

decisions.source_one_line: LLM Gateway 是统一管理模型调用的网关层，负责路由、重试、fallback、限流、成本、日志、策略和供应商切换。

decisions.source_one_line: LLM Training Pipeline 是把数据、算力、预训练、后训练、偏好优化、推理强化、工具能力和评测闭环组合起来，让模型持续变强的训练流程。

decisions.source_one_line: LLM-as-Judge 是用另一个模型或同类模型作为评估器，对输出、引用、格式或过程进行评分。

decisions.source_one_line: Long-Horizon Context Engineering 是面向长时程 Agent 任务的上下文治理方法：当任务跨越数十到数百轮行动、超出单次 [[Context Window]] 时，用压缩整合、结构化笔记和子代理隔离来维持目标、状态、证据和决策的一致性。

decisions.source_one_line: Neo4j 是一个图数据库和 GraphRAG 工程生态，常用来把文档、chunk、实体、关系、向量索引、全文索引和 Cypher 查询放到同一个可查询的知识图谱系统里。

decisions.source_one_line: OMX `$` 指令是在 Codex 会话里触发本地 skill / workflow 的入口：它把“让模型随便做”改成“按某种流程纪律做”，例如澄清、计划、执行、并行、评审、研究或目标验收。

decisions.source_one_line: Observability 是让 Agent 系统的输入、输出、工具调用、延迟、成本、错误和质量信号可观察、可调试、可追踪。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading

decisions.source_one_line: Patch Validation 是验证代码修改是否真正解决问题且没有破坏旧功能的过程。

decisions.source_one_line: Plan-and-Solve Prompting 是把 [[Zero-shot CoT]] 从“直接一步步想”改成“先生成计划，再按计划求解”的提示方法。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading

decisions.source_one_line: Progressive Disclosure 是把工具、skill、文档或上下文资源分层暴露给 Agent：先给轻量索引和摘要，确认需要后再加载完整说明、schema、脚本或参考资料。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Prompt Engineering 是围绕 prompt 的设计、测试、版本管理和效果优化实践；它把“怎么给模型下任务”从一次性写指令，推进到可评估、可复用、可回滚的工程流程。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Provider-first Agent SDK 是围绕某个模型/平台供应商的能力封装 Agent 应用的 SDK：它优先接入该平台的模型、工具调用、handoff、guardrails、tracing、session 或流式能力，而不是先提供通用状态图 runtime。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Query Planning 是在检索前把复杂问题拆成检索步骤、子查询和知识源选择的过程；它比 query rewrite 更像检索层的轻量计划。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Query Rewrite 是把用户原始问题改写成更适合检索系统的查询表达，以提高召回、精确匹配或上下文对齐。

decisions.source_one_line: RAG Access Control 是在检索、上下文装配和输出前确保用户只能看到授权资料的治理边界；它不是生成后把敏感词遮掉。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: RAG Citation Faithfulness 是检查答案中的引用是否真的支持对应结论的评估边界：有 citation 不等于有证据，有证据也不等于模型正确使用了证据。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: RAGFlow 是 InfiniFlow 的开源 RAG / context layer 平台：它把复杂文档解析、切分、检索、重排、引用、API、UI 和部分 Agent 能力组合成端到端知识库应用底座。

decisions.source_one_line: RAGGraph 是一个不稳定说法，通常可能指“把 RAG pipeline 编排成图工作流”，也可能指“用图结构组织知识并做检索”。

decisions.source_one_line: Reasoning Trace 是模型在解决任务过程中显式留下的推理文字或推理步骤记录。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Reasoning Trace is a kind of trace/trajectory artifact; Observability is too broad as a direct parent here.

decisions.source_one_line: Reflexion 是一种让语言 Agent 在执行后生成反思文本，并把反思作为经验记忆来改进下一轮行动的机制。

decisions.source_one_line: Replay 是用保存的输入、工具结果、检索结果或环境快照重放 Agent 执行过程，让失败可以复现、比较和回归测试。

decisions.source_one_line: Repo Context 是代码 Agent 为解决任务需要理解的代码库上下文。

decisions.source_one_line: Reranking 是在初步检索后，用更精细的模型或规则重新排序候选上下文。

decisions.source_one_line: Retriever 是根据输入问题从外部知识库中找出相关资料的组件。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Role-playing Agent 是通过明确角色、任务和约束，让一个或多个 Agent 按角色身份进行协作的模式；它的关键不在“假装角色”，而在角色设定如何约束对话和任务推进。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: State Graph Runtime 是把 Agent / workflow 的执行过程显式建模为“状态 + 节点 + 边 + 路由 + checkpoint”的运行时，让长任务可以循环、分支、暂停、恢复和审计。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: TF-IDF 向量化是把文档表示成“词项权重”的稀疏向量：一个词在当前文档中越重要、在整个语料中越少见，它的权重通常越高。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: TF-IDF is a sparse lexical weighting/representation used in retrieval contexts; it is not a RAG subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this pair to up. Keep representation/algorithm/route/strategy boundaries separate.

decisions.source_one_line: TF-IDF 向量化是把文档表示成“词项权重”的稀疏向量：一个词在当前文档中越重要、在整个语料中越少见，它的权重通常越高。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: TF-IDF can supply sparse lexical scoring intuition, but it is not a retriever component subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this pair to up. Keep representation/algorithm/route/strategy boundaries separate.

decisions.source_one_line: TTL（Time To Live）是给缓存、记忆、索引记录、锁、心跳或网络数据设置“最多可被无条件相信多久”的生命周期边界；到期后，系统应删除、降权、刷新、重建或重新验证。

decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Task Success Rate 是一组任务中端到端成功完成的比例，通常用成功任务数除以总任务数表示。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Tool Permissioning 是给 Agent 工具和工具动作设置权限、范围、审批和风险等级的机制。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Tool Permissioning constrains and governs tools; it is not a tool-use subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this candidate to up; preserve as adjacency or explain with typed relation only if needed.

decisions.source_one_line: Tool Poisoning 是工具描述、schema、元数据、返回值或供应链被污染，诱导 Agent 错误调用工具或执行恶意动作。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Tool Poisoning is a threat/failure mode against tools; it is not a tool-use subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this candidate to up; preserve as adjacency or explain with typed relation only if needed.

decisions.source_one_line: Tool Registry 是管理 Agent 可用工具名称、schema、描述、版本、来源、权限和状态的目录。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Tool Registry is infrastructure/catalog metadata for tools; it is not a tool-use subtype.
decisions.guardrail: Do not write this candidate to up; preserve as adjacency or explain with typed relation only if needed.

decisions.source_one_line: Top-K 是“按分数排序后取前 K 个”的选择规则；在 RAG 检索里，它通常表示取前 K 个候选 chunk / passages，而在生成解码里，top-k 表示只从概率最高的 K 个 token 中采样。
decisions.llm_judgment_basis: card frontmatter + one-line/boundary snippets + relation-field rules; not source-level re-reading
decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Trace 是对 Agent / LLM 应用执行过程的结构化可观察记录，包括输入、模型调用、工具调用、工具结果、状态变化、错误、成本、延迟和最终结果。

decisions.source_one_line: Type-safe Agent SDK 是把 Agent 的依赖、工具参数、结构化输出和运行上下文纳入类型系统/验证框架的 SDK 路线，用来减少“LLM 输出能跑但结构不可信”的工程错误。

decisions.source_one_line: Vector Database 是为 embedding 向量检索设计的数据库或索引系统，常用于 RAG 从大量文档片段中找语义相似内容。

decisions.decision_rationale: Topic-family overlap is useful for review batching, but it does not prove a strict parent/child taxonomy edge.

decisions.source_one_line: Workflow Guardrails 是把 guardrails 放到 workflow 的输入、模型调用、工具调用、检索、输出、状态变化和副作用提交边界上，而不是只在最终回答上过滤。
